creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text: It seems we will need new 'elf32_hwcap' and 'elf32_hwcap2' globals that are set to the same values used in sys/arm for 32-bit arm.  Note that the port patch is wrong as it would break on a true 32-bit arm host.  We cannot change the value of HWCAP_* flags as that is an ABI breakage.  Likely we will need HWCAP32_* constants and HWCAP32_2_* constants or some such in sys/arm64/include/elf.h.
